channel.title: Ruminations on The City
channel.description: Recent content in Ruminations on The City

item.title: The City Stirs Again
item.description:
The notebooks have been gathering dust for years now. Somewhere between the turn of the millennium and whatever this present age has become, the City faded into memory — a collection of half-remembered faces, borrowed names, and nights that ran far too long.

But the pages are still here. The stories are still here.

What follows in these archives is an attempt to reconstruct a place that never existed and the people who never lived there — the chronicle of a city that ran on secrets, old blood, and the particular madness that descends when you spend too many Fridays pretending the world is stranger and darker than it actually is.

item.title: Welcome Back
item.description:
This is a place that has lived in my mind for years, rent free. It’s ebbed and flowed, but has always been there. It’s returned at odd moments, late at night or when my mind wanders.

Urb-ex, various readings, one of those flashes where you know you’ve been here before.

There’s more here than there was when it was live. Not all from the original is documented yet - I’ll be trying to fix that. However, there’s also 20+ years of new things that have crept in.
